"HTTP/2 400 Bad Request"
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/.pyenv/versions/3.10.4/lib/python3.10/site-packages/postgrest/_sync/request_builder.py", line 78, in execute
    raise APIError(r.json())
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/.pyenv/versions/3.10.4/lib/python3.10/site-packages/httpx/_models.py", line 832, in json
    return jsonlib.loads(self.content, **kwargs)
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/.pyenv/versions/3.10.4/lib/python3.10/json/__init__.py", line 346, in loads
    return _default_decoder.decode(s)
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/.pyenv/versions/3.10.4/lib/python3.10/json/decoder.py", line 337, in decode
    obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end())
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/.pyenv/versions/3.10.4/lib/python3.10/json/decoder.py", line 355, in raw_decode
    raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None
json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 2, in <module>
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/Documents/claude_wk/investment-news-bot/app/main.py", line 33, in run_delivery
    fresh = db.filter_unseen(articles)
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/Documents/claude_wk/investment-news-bot/app/db.py", line 96, in filter_unseen
    .execute()
  File "/Users/yutarotobita/.pyenv/versions/3.10.4/lib/python3.10/site-packages/postgrest/_sync/request_builder.py", line 82, in execute
    raise APIError(generate_default_error_message(r))
postgrest.exceptions.APIError: {'message': 'JSON could not be generated', 'code': 400, 'hint': 'Refer to full message for details', 'details': "b'Bad Request'"}
